utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Nothing , Monica and I had a stupid fight .

emotion_cause.span: 2_Monica and I had a stupid fight .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But you are still moving in together , right ? Because my ad came out today .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: " Wanted . Female roommate , non ... smoker , non ... ugly . " Nice !

emotion_cause.span: 4_" Wanted . Female roommate , non ... smoker , non ... ugly . " Nice !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I just figured you know , after living with you it would be an interesting change of pace to have a female roommate , you know ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Someone I can learn from , someone ... someone who different than me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And what more different than me . A guy who not 19 than say a girl who is 19 ?
